targetTranslation: the sending down (of الْكِتٰبِ - the Book)
ayahArabic: تَنزِيلُ ٱلْكِتٰبِ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ مِن رَّبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [This is] the revelation of the Book about which there is no doubt from the Lord of the worlds.

ayahArabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ بَلْ هُوَ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّكَ لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أَتَىٰهُم مِّن نَّذِيرٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Or do they say, "He invented it"? Rather, it is the truth from your Lord, [O Muḥammad], that you may warn a people to whom no warner has come before you [so] perhaps they will be guided.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَا لَكُم مِّن دُونِهِۦ مِن وَلِىٍّ وَلَا شَفِيعٍ أَفَلَا تَتَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is Allāh who created the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them in six days; then He established Himself above the Throne. You have not besides Him any protector or any intercessor; so will you not be reminded?

ayahArabic: يُدَبِّرُ ٱلْأَمْرَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ثُمَّ يَعْرُجُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥٓ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ مِّمَّا تَعُدُّونَ
ayahEnglish: He arranges [each] matter from the heaven to the earth; then it will ascend to Him in a Day, the extent of which is a thousand years of those which you count.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَحْسَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ وَبَدَأَ خَلْقَ ٱلْإِنسٰنِ مِن طِينٍ

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ سَوَّىٰهُ وَنَفَخَ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِهِۦ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then He proportioned him and breathed into him from His [created] soul and made for you hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]; little are you grateful.

targetTranslation: is it when? (questioning what comes after ضَلَلْنَا)
ayahArabic: وَقَالُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا ضَلَلْنَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَءِنَّا لَفِى خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍۭ بَلْ هُم بِلِقَآءِ رَبِّهِمْ كٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When we are lost [i.e., disintegrated] within the earth, will we indeed be [recreated] in a new creation?" Rather, they are, in the meeting with their Lord, disbelievers.

targetTranslation: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to tell the people about death)
ayahArabic: قُلْ يَتَوَفَّىٰكُم مَّلَكُ ٱلْمَوْتِ ٱلَّذِى وُكِّلَ بِكُمْ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "The angel of death who has been entrusted with you will take you. Then to your Lord you will be returned."

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ تَرَىٰٓ إِذِ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ نَاكِسُوا۟ رُءُوسِهِمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ رَبَّنَآ أَبْصَرْنَا وَسَمِعْنَا فَٱرْجِعْنَا نَعْمَلْ صٰلِحًا إِنَّا مُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: If you could but see when the criminals are hanging their heads before their Lord, [saying], "Our Lord, we have seen and heard, so return us [to the world]; we will work righteousness. Indeed, we are [now] certain."

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ شِئْنَا لَءَاتَيْنَا كُلَّ نَفْسٍ هُدَىٰهَا وَلٰكِنْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ مِنِّى لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: And if We had willed, We could have given every soul its guidance, but the word from Me will come into effect [that] "I will surely fill Hell with jinn and people all together.

ayahArabic: فَذُوقُوا۟ بِمَا نَسِيتُمْ لِقَآءَ يَوْمِكُمْ هٰذَآ إِنَّا نَسِينٰكُمْ وَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابَ ٱلْخُلْدِ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ بِهَا خَرُّوا۟ سُجَّدًا وَسَبَّحُوا۟ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّهِمْ وَهُمْ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Only those believe in Our verses who, when they are reminded by them, fall down in prostration and exalt [Allāh] with praise of their Lord, and they are not arrogant.

targetTranslation: those who (subject of فَسَقُوا۟/they defiantly disobeyed)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ فَسَقُوا۟ فَمَأْوَىٰهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ كُلَّمَآ أَرَادُوٓا۟ أَن يَخْرُجُوا۟ مِنْهَآ أُعِيدُوا۟ فِيهَا وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ ذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
ayahEnglish: But as for those who defiantly disobeyed, their refuge is the Fire. Every time they wish to emerge from it, they will be returned to it while it is said to them, "Taste the punishment of the Fire which you used to deny."

targetTranslation: less than (describes العَذَابِ الْأَدْنَىٰ in relation to العَذَابِ الْأَكْبَرِ)
ayahArabic: وَلَنُذِيقَنَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْأَدْنَىٰ دُونَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْأَكْبَرِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We will surely let them taste the nearer punishment short of the greater punishment that perhaps they will return [i.e., repent].

targetTranslation: they return (referring to those who will taste punishment)

targetTranslation: more/most unjust (describing who in وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ - and who is more unjust)
ayahArabic: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّن ذُكِّرَ بِـَٔايٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ ثُمَّ أَعْرَضَ عَنْهَآ إِنَّا مِنَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ مُنتَقِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who is more unjust than one who is reminded of the verses of his Lord; then he turns away from them? Indeed We, from the criminals, will take retribution.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتٰبَ فَلَا تَكُن فِى مِرْيَةٍ مِّن لِّقَآئِهِۦ وَجَعَلْنٰهُ هُدًى لِّبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ
ayahEnglish: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture, so do not be in doubt over his meeting. And We made it [i.e., the Torah] guidance for the Children of Israel.

targetTranslation: leaders (as the object being made by Allah)
ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْهُمْ أَئِمَّةً يَهْدُونَ بِأَمْرِنَا لَمَّا صَبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our command when they were patient and [when] they were certain of Our signs.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْهُمْ أَئِمَّةً يَهْدُونَ بِأَمْرِنَا لَمَّا صَبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يُوقِنُونَ

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْهُمْ أَئِمَّةً يَهْدُونَ بِأَمْرِنَا لَمَّا صَبَرُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We made from among them leaders guiding by Our command when they were patient and [when] they were certain of Our signs.

targetTranslation: your Lord (being acted upon by إِنَّ indeed/truly)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَفْصِلُ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فِيمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ.

targetTranslation: and have they not (before يَهْدِ - guide)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِى مَسٰكِنِهِمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ أَفَلَا يَسْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them, [as] they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs; then do they not hear?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِى مَسٰكِنِهِمْ إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ أَفَلَا يَسْمَعُونَ

ayahEnglish: Has it not become clear to them how many generations We destroyed before them, [as] they walk among their dwellings? Indeed in that are signs; then do they not hear?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا نَسُوقُ ٱلْمَآءَ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْجُرُزِ فَنُخْرِجُ بِهِۦ زَرْعًا تَأْكُلُ مِنْهُ أَنْعٰمُهُمْ وَأَنفُسُهُمْ أَفَلَا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not seen that We drive water [in clouds] to barren land and bring forth thereby crops from which their livestock eat and [they] themselves? Then do they not see?

targetTranslation: when? (asking about the time of الْفَتْحُ/the victory)
ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْفَتْحُ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْفَتْحُ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful?"

ayahArabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْفَتْحُ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And they say, "When will be this conquest, if you should be truthful?"

ayahArabic: قُلْ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَتْحِ لَا يَنفَعُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِيمٰنُهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنظَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "On the Day of Conquest the belief of those who had disbelieved will not benefit them, nor will they be reprieved."

targetTranslation: ones who are waiting (subject of إِنَّهُم)
ayahArabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَنْهُمْ وَٱنتَظِرْ إِنَّهُم مُّنتَظِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: So turn away from them and wait. Indeed, they are waiting.
